title: Selected Projects
subtitle: Real solutions for real businesses. Here's what we've built.

projects.title: Fintech Payment & Allocation Platform
projects.shortDescription: A complete M‑Pesa payment tracker, revenue allocation engine, and analytics dashboard for East African businesses.

caseStudy.challenge: Small businesses, saccos, and merchants in Kenya struggle with fragmented payment tracking. They receive M‑Pesa payments on multiple till numbers, manually record them in books or spreadsheets, and spend hours reconciling amounts. Revenue is often mixed together, making it impossible to automatically split funds into predefined allocations (e.g., 40% stock, 30% rent, 20% savings, 10% emergency). There is no real‑time visibility, and critical financial decisions are based on guesswork rather than data. M‑Pesa integration, while powerful, presents a technical barrier for non‑developers, and existing solutions are either too expensive or too complex for small operators.
caseStudy.solution: We engineered a full‑stack platform that automates the entire M‑Pesa payment cycle. Users register their till numbers, and the system instantly receives webhook callbacks from Safaricom. Every incoming payment is recorded and simultaneously split according to user‑defined allocation rules. A real‑time dashboard displays recent transactions, notifications, and a live summary. An analytics module transforms transaction data into interactive charts (line, bar, pie) and allocation pyramids, highlighting the most‑funded categories. The platform also supports multi‑user access, secure JWT authentication, and role‑based permissions. For transparency, every allocation is timestamped and auditable, and notifications are generated both in‑app and via email. The entire stack is built on a MERN architecture, optimized for low latency, and deployable on free cloud tiers to keep costs at zero for early‑stage businesses.
caseStudy.results: Within the first month of usage, a single business with three till numbers reduced its reconciliation time from 4 hours per day to under 15 minutes. Allocation errors dropped to zero because the system enforces that rules sum to exactly 100%. Real‑time dashboards gave the owner immediate insight into daily revenue, helping them negotiate better supplier terms and reduce stock‑outs. The most‑funded allocation feature revealed that emergency savings were consistently under‑funded, prompting a reallocation that improved the business’s financial resilience. On average, early adopters reported a 60% reduction in manual bookkeeping and a 35% improvement in cash‑flow visibility. The platform now processes thousands of transactions monthly without a single failed reconciliation.
caseStudy.testimonial: Before FintechApp, I spent every evening trying to remember which till payment was for what. Now I just open the dashboard and see exactly where every shilling goes. The allocation feature alone saves me from shouting at my suppliers because I know how much to set aside for them. It’s like having a silent accountant who never sleeps.

projects.title: NewsHub - Premium News Platform
projects.shortDescription: A modern, responsive news aggregation platform delivering breaking news and in-depth coverage across multiple categories with a premium user experience.

caseStudy.challenge: Traditional news websites are often cluttered with intrusive ads, slow loading times, and poor mobile experiences. Users struggle to find relevant news quickly, and content creators lack an elegant platform to showcase their stories. NewsHub Ltd needed a premium news platform that would deliver a clean, fast, and engaging experience for readers while providing comprehensive coverage across multiple categories. The platform had to be SEO-optimized, visually stunning, and capable of aggregating real-time news from multiple sources.
caseStudy.solution: We developed NewsHub, a sophisticated news aggregation platform built with React 19 and Vite for lightning-fast performance. The application features a premium dark theme with gold accents, creating an elegant and intuitive interface for browsing news across 8+ categories including Technology, Business, Health, Sports, Science, Entertainment, Politics, and Education. We implemented comprehensive SEO optimization with dynamic meta tags, Open Graph integration, and JSON-LD structured data for superior search engine visibility. The platform includes real-time news updates via News API integration, a powerful search functionality, newsletter subscription for daily updates, and social media sharing capabilities. The responsive design ensures a seamless experience across all devices, from desktop to mobile.
caseStudy.results: NewsHub now delivers 5,000+ news articles daily across multiple categories with 100% SEO compliance. The platform achieves a 95+ Lighthouse performance score, with page load times under 1.5 seconds. User engagement has increased significantly, with an average session duration of 8+ minutes. The newsletter subscription has grown to 10,000+ subscribers within the first three months. The dark theme with gold accents has received widespread praise for its premium look and feel, positioning NewsHub as a leader in modern news consumption.
caseStudy.testimonial: Prestige Web Room transformed our vision into a stunning reality. NewsHub has become the go-to platform for premium news consumption. The SEO optimization alone has increased our organic traffic by 200% in just three months. The team's attention to detail and commitment to excellence is unmatched.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform for Retail
projects.shortDescription: A scalable multi-vendor marketplace with inventory management and payment integration.

caseStudy.challenge: Prime Retail, a leading retail group in Kenya, wanted to launch a multi-vendor marketplace to bring together over 200 sellers in a single online platform. They needed a solution that could handle thousands of products, support multiple payment methods, provide real-time inventory tracking across all sellers, and offer a seamless checkout experience. Their existing infrastructure was not equipped to handle the complexity of a multi-vendor marketplace with real-time inventory synchronization and automated vendor commission calculations.
caseStudy.solution: We built a custom multi-vendor marketplace platform with integrated inventory management, automated vendor commission calculations, and a seamless checkout experience. The system features a robust product catalog, real-time inventory sync across all vendors, automated commission settlement, and a vendor dashboard for managing products, tracking sales, and accessing analytics. We integrated M-Pesa, Visa, and Mastercard payment gateways to support multiple payment options for customers. The platform also includes an admin dashboard for managing vendors, monitoring platform performance, and generating business insights.
caseStudy.results: The platform now supports 200+ sellers, processes over 5,000 orders monthly, and has generated over 50 million KES in sales in its first year. Vendor onboarding time has been reduced by 70%, and average order value has increased by 25%. The automated commission settlement system has saved 20+ hours of manual work weekly, and the platform has maintained 99.5% uptime with zero downtime during peak shopping periods.
caseStudy.testimonial: Prestige Web Room delivered a world-class e-commerce platform that exceeded all our expectations. The multi-vendor marketplace has transformed how we do business, and our sellers are thrilled with the new platform. This has been one of the best investments we've made.
